contract_changes: Updated evidence_quality from stub to partial
Added scan evidence comment to run postconditions
Added note about callback FP pattern
audits.notes: Spot-check of jasperapp/jasper revealed callback-based sqlite3 usage (this.sqlite.all(sql, params, (error, row) => error ? resolve({error}) : resolve(rows))) is being flagged as missing try-catch. The error IS handled via the callback error parameter, not try-catch. Scanner has FP for callback patterns wrapped in Promises. evidence_quality set to partial due to this pattern.
